# Table-ownership baseline (#2895) — per-(crate, table) count of NON-owner raw
# write sites (`INSERT [OR ...] INTO t` / `UPDATE t` / `DELETE FROM t`).
# Generated by: python3 scripts/check-table-ownership.py --update-baseline
# The check-table-ownership prek hook fails when a non-owner (crate, table)
# pair's count EXCEEDS its baseline. Owner-crate writes are unconstrained and
# never listed here. Ownership map: src-tauri/migrations/AGENTS.md.
#
# Format: <count> <crate> <table>  [# annotation]
# Blank lines and full-line `#` comments are ignored when parsing counts; an
# inline `# …` after the three fields documents WHY a cross-crate write is a
# sanctioned carve-out or WHEN it migrates. `--update-baseline` recomputes the
# counts but PRESERVES this header, every surviving pair's inline comment and
# the comment block directly above it (keyed by crate+table), and any footer.

# --- app crate: cross-crate writers migrating behind owner-crate fns ---
25 app blocks  # migrating: slice 2 (app blocks); recovery carve-out subset remains post-slice-2/3

# --- engine crate: projection-time cache co-writers (legitimate carve-out,
# two-arm lockstep / sql_only fallback, #891) + op_log ingest (migrating) ---
2 engine agenda_cache  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine block_links  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine block_tag_inherited  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine block_tag_refs  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine op_log  # migrating: slice 5 (store::op_log::ingest_remote_op_in_tx)
2 engine page_link_cache  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
4 engine pages_cache  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine projected_agenda_cache  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)
2 engine tags_cache  # projection co-writer (two-arm lockstep, #891)

# === Split contract (maintainer-approved 2026-07-24, #2895) ===
# engine owns the Loro→SQL PROJECTION writes to `blocks`; store owns the
# PHYSICAL block primitives below it (page_id/space_id materialization,
# soft-delete, descendant cache) and cannot call up into engine. These 10
# store writers are sanctioned owner-adjacent carve-outs, not migratable debt.
10 store blocks  # owner-adjacent: physical primitives (split contract)
